original: Web TicketCard component shows PR status badge (colored dot/label) when TicketLink has prState: green for 'merged', blue for 'open', gray for 'draft', red for 'closed'
refined: When a TicketCard component renders a TicketLink with prState='merged', the badge element has class/style indicating green. When prState='open', badge indicates blue. When prState='draft', badge indicates gray. When prState='closed', badge indicates red. Badge is absent when prState is null/undefined.

original: Web ticket detail page shows PR status section with PR number (linked to GitHub), current state badge, and merge info (SHA, author, time) when merged
refined: Ticket detail page renders a PR status section containing: (1) an <a> tag with href matching pattern 'github.com/{owner}/{repo}/pull/{number}' when prNumber exists, (2) a badge element reflecting prState value, (3) when prState='merged', mergeInfo object with sha (40-char hex), author string, and mergedAt ISO timestamp is displayed.

original: Web ticket detail activity timeline shows 'PR merged: owner/repo#12 by @user' for VCS_PR_MERGED activity type
refined: Activity timeline component, when processing an activity with type='VCS_PR_MERGED', renders text content matching regex /^PR merged: [^/]+/[^#]+#\d+ by @\w+$/ containing the repository name, PR number, and author username.

original: koda ticket show <ref> displays linked PR number and state in the output when prState is present on a TicketLink
refined: CLI command 'koda ticket show <ref>' stdout output contains PR number and prState value when the ticket has a TicketLink with non-null prState. Output format includes '#{prNumber}' and prState value.

original: koda ticket show <ref> --json includes prState, prNumber, prUpdatedAt in links[] entries
refined: CLI command 'koda ticket show <ref> --json' outputs valid JSON where the 'links' array contains objects with keys 'prState', 'prNumber', and 'prUpdatedAt' present (not undefined) when those fields exist on the TicketLink.

original: POST /projects/:slug/vcs/sync-pr triggers manual PR status sync and returns { updated: number }
refined: HTTP POST to '/projects/{slug}/vcs/sync-pr' returns status 200 and JSON body with key 'updated' whose value is a non-negative integer. The sync operation updates at least 0 records.

original: koda vcs sync-pr calls the manual PR sync endpoint and prints the count of updated PRs
refined: CLI command 'koda vcs sync-pr' exits with code 0 and stdout contains a string matching /Updated \d+ PR/ or /0 PRs? updated/i indicating the count of synchronized pull requests.

original: i18n keys exist in apps/api/src/i18n/en/vcs.json and zh/vcs.json for PR status labels and merge notification strings
refined: File 'apps/api/src/i18n/en/vcs.json' exists and contains valid JSON with keys for 'merged', 'open', 'draft', 'closed' PR states. File 'apps/api/src/i18n/zh/vcs.json' exists and contains valid JSON with the same keys.

original: i18n keys exist in apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json and zh.json for PR status display labels
refined: File 'apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json' contains a 'prStatus' object with keys 'merged', 'open', 'draft', 'closed'. File 'apps/web/i18n/locales/zh.json' contains the same 'prStatus' object structure with Chinese translation values.
